name: Brooklyn-Style Sausage and Peppers

ingredients.item: large onion cut into large pieces

method: In a large frying pan on medium heat, fry the outside of sausage links and set aside. For this recipe, you can use either a crock pot or a large stockpot. I use a crockpot because it makes everything tender and delicious. In a stockpot on medium, or a crockpot on medium or high depending on the power of your crockpot, combine sausages, onions, peppers, crushed garlic, red pepper, red wine, beef broth, salt, and pepper. Mix well and bring to a boil if using a stockpot, then lower the heat to medium-low, cover, and cook for 4 hours, or until liquid absorbs and vegetables and sausages are tender. If using a crockpot, add the vegetables first, broth, wine, sausages, and seasonings. I cover and let it cook for 3- 4 hours, but you can cook it on a lower setting longer if you want to cook it 6 hours. That's the convenience of a crockpot, just make sure to check on it and give it a stir when needed. Serving suggestion: You can make pasta, roasted potatoes, or any Italian side dish (contorni) will do! Serving suggestion: fresh bread and salad. Serves 2-3. Olé
